parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(category_slug, 'без категорії') AS category,
  ROUND(SUM(ABS(amount)) / 100.0, 2) AS total_uah,
  COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM mono_transaction
WHERE amount < 0
  AND time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY category_slug
ORDER BY total_uah DESC
LIMIT 10
